children.heading: .—Federal Charter
children.label: a .—Federal Charter
children.text: American Academy of Arts and Letters (in this chapter, the “corporation”) is a federally chartered corporation.

children.heading: .—Place of Incorporation
children.label: b .—Place of Incorporation
children.text: The corporation is declared to be incorporated in the District of Columbia.
